{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Flowing Sword technique
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] uses the [[Flowing Sword technique]] to cycle [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3">''Soulsmith'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
